import io
import string
import list

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a = match list.get(parts, 0)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end
let b = match list.get(parts, 1)
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
when None
  0
end
let g = gcd(a, b)
println("gcd=#{g}")
